decisions.name: security
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): plaintext secret input (Slack signing / Discord public key) + SecretResolver.store() + provider-specific validation branching

decisions.name: performance
decisions.reason: 알고리즘 복잡도·hot path 변경 없음 — 동기 validation logic

decisions.name: architecture
decisions.reason: provider enum 확장 (telegram → telegram/slack/discord) — DTO/service interface contract 변경

decisions.name: requirement
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): provider별 validation 분기 (Slack hex32 / Discord hex64 / Telegram rejection) + inboundSigningPlaintext plaintext handling spec

decisions.name: scope
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): DTO + service + frontend UI + documentation + i18n + e2e 6개 영역 다중 파일 조정 — scope drift 위험

decisions.name: side_effect
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): ChatChannelConfigDto 신규 필드 (inboundSigningPlaintext) + service validation logic branch + fixture parameter 제거 (ownerEmailVerified)

decisions.name: maintainability
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): src 코드 변경 — DTO validation 추가 + service 분기 로직 + e2e 테스트 조정 + fixture 리팩토링

decisions.name: testing
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): provider별 validation case 신규 추가 (Slack/Discord) + e2e fixture 단순화 + formData truncation regression e2e 제거

decisions.name: documentation
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): triggers.{en.}mdx + discord.{en.}mdx + slack.{en.}mdx + i18n dict/ko/en + plan 3파일 (complete + in-progress) 변경

decisions.name: dependency
decisions.reason: 신규 의존성 없음 — 기존 SecretResolver / class-validator / bcrypt 재사용

decisions.name: database
decisions.reason: schema/migration 변경 없음 — config JSONB 그대로 유지

decisions.name: concurrency
decisions.reason: async/락/큐/워커 코드 변경 없음 — 동기 validation logic

decisions.name: api_contract
decisions.reason: POST /api/triggers DTO 신규 필드 (inboundSigningPlaintext) + provider enum 확장 (slack/discord 추가) — API contract 변경

decisions.name: user_guide_sync
decisions.reason: PROJECT.md '통합 신규/제공자 변경' 매트릭스 match: discord/slack provider 가이드 (06-integrations) + ImplAnchor + i18n dict keys + triggers 섹션 (02-nodes) 갱신
